summary.key_theme: 華爾街分析師普遍看好 Cloudflare 在 AI 與網路安全領域的成長潛力，紛紛上調目標價，儘管市場對其高估值仍存在分歧。

bullish.title: Oppenheimer Maintains Outperform on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $330
bullish.reason: Oppenheimer 分析師 Param Singh 維持「優於大盤」評級，並將目標價調升至 $330，顯示市場對其長期成長動能具備高度信心。

bullish.title: Citizens Maintains Market Outperform on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $330
bullish.reason: 分析師 Patrick Walravens 上調目標價至 $330，反映出對 Cloudflare 在邊緣運算與安全市場市占率擴張的正面預期。

bullish.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $322
bullish.reason: Morgan Stanley 分析師 Keith Weiss 將目標價調升至 $322，認可公司在企業級安全解決方案的強勁競爭力。

bullish.title: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $300
bullish.reason: Truist Securities 分析師 Junaid Siddiqui 維持買入評級並上調目標價，顯示機構投資人對其獲利能力的持續看好。

bullish.title: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $300
bullish.reason: Wells Fargo 分析師 Ryan Macwilliams 上調目標價，進一步強化了市場對 Cloudflare 成長前景的共識。

bullish.title: Cloudflare (NET) Stock Gets Fair Value Boost As Analysts Raise AI And Security Targets
bullish.reason: 模型估值從 $234.18 上調至 $251.87，顯示市場對其 AI 與安全業務的內在價值評估持續提升。

bearish.title: Cloudflare Stock Is Not a Buy Despite Its Strong Outlook. Here’s Why.
bearish.reason: 儘管前景看好，但分析指出其估值過高，風險回報比不佳，建議投資人保持謹慎。

bearish.title: CoreWeave Jumps 6% on Truist Buy Upgrade, Pulling Ahead of Cloudflare, Snowflake, Oracle
bearish.reason: 競爭對手 CoreWeave 獲得評級上調並表現強勁，對 Cloudflare 造成相對的資金排擠效應。

neutral.title: Cloudflare (NET) Gains As Market Dips: What You Should Know
neutral.reason: 報導股價單日上漲 1.91 %，屬於正常的市場波動，未有特定基本面消息驅動。
